toasts.error-no-permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
toasts.error-family-exists: A family with this name already exists.
toasts.error-family-admin-required: At least one admin user is required.
toasts.error-user-already-in-family: User is already a member of the family.

errors.username-too-long: Username cannot be longer than 40 characters.

LoginPage.login-text: Sign in to access all your families and create new ones.
LoginPage.login-error: An error occurred while signing in.

FamiliesPage.title: Families
FamiliesPage.name: Name
FamiliesPage.family-types-info: The styling and features may vary based on the selected type.
FamiliesPage.family-types-alert: Bear in mind that this choice is permanent and cannot be changed later.
FamiliesPage.family-node-image-info: If enabled, each tree node will display an image representing the family member.
FamiliesPage.family-node-gallery-info: If enabled, each family member will have its own image gallery.
FamiliesPage.family-members-info: Manage the users who have access to this family.
FamiliesPage.family-member-role: The role determines the level of access the user has within the family.
FamiliesPage.family-member-remove-confirm-description: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the family?

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.description: Here you can view and modify your personal information.
ProfilePage.private-description: Enable this option to make your profile and your families visible only to you and your family members.
ProfilePage.name: Name
ProfilePage.email-hint: Email address is managed by your OAuth provider.
ProfilePage.email-unmatched: The email address does not match.
ProfilePage.account-delete-text: This will permanently delete your account and all your families.
ProfilePage.account-delete-prompt: To confirm, please typo your email address:
ProfilePage.account-delete-error: An error occurred while deleting your account.
ProfilePage.account-logout-text: Are you sure you want to log out?
ProfilePage.account-logout-error: An error occurred while logging out.
